## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Fix error (typo, inaccuracy, broken link)
- [ ] New content (new page or section)
- [ ] Content improvement (clarity, restructure, expanded coverage)
- [ ] Site configuration or tooling
- [ ] Other

## Pages affected

List the files or pages modified by this PR.

## Validation

- [ ] Built successfully with `mkdocs build`
- [ ] Verified rendering with `mkdocs serve`
- [ ] Links and images are valid

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and minimal
- [ ] Commit messages are clear
- [ ] Related issue linked (if applicable)
